attacking_style: Early aggressor in breakaways on flatter/non-climber stages, willing to commit to long-range moves that ultimately get absorbed before technical or climbing finishes.
team_tactics: AG2R uses him opportunistically as first attacker despite not being primary selection, suggesting flexible domestique/breakaway role rather than protected status.
terrain_preference: Non-climbing breakaway stages where his classics-style engine can be deployed; exposed on technical finishes and any significant climbing where breakaways get absorbed.
vulnerability: Technical finishes and climbing stages where his non-climber profile means breakaway efforts are neutralized in final 20km by GC or specialist teams.
key_patterns: Deployed as early breakaway instigator on non-climbing stages (2 observations)
Breakaway efforts absorbed with 20km remaining on technical/climbing finishes (2 observations)
Used as tactical flexibility option rather than protected rider status (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Shows willingness to work for team in breakaways but no results indicating breakthrough or decline
